entries.rawMarkdown:
## Version 1 - 2026-03-24


Welcome to Hoppers - your secure, encrypted mobile companion for Claude Code. This inaugural release establishes the foundation for private, powerful AI interactions on the go. Fork from [happy](https://github.com/slopus/happy.git).

- Rename project from Happy to Hoppers for private usage with new domain: `hoppers.cc`
